integrated.title: End-to-End Integrated Support
integrated.description: Discovery, visualization, infrastructure, sales, and reinvestment. By supporting the entire tourism process seamlessly, we maximize regional value.

digital.title: Data & DX-First Tourism Strategy
digital.description: Implementation of cutting-edge AI and algorithms by Meta/Google alumni. World-class technical capabilities applied to regional tourism.

network.title: Global × Local Connectivity
network.description: Both affluent international networks and trust from municipalities and regions. Only by having both can we deliver real results.
network.detail: Proven track record in Izu and Shimane

execution.title: Execution Power Through On-Site Operations
execution.description: We execute even vacation rental and tour operations in-house. Not just strategy—a partner that accompanies you to the end.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.heading: Connecting hearts and land,<0/> <1>weaving stories through time</1>
philosophy.description1: We, Discovery Hidden Japan, connect travelers with regions and bring the hidden beauty and stories of Japan to the world.
philosophy.description2: We cherish encounters with authentic life, culture, and atmosphere found beyond over-commercialized tourist destinations, and redefine the value of travel.
philosophy.description3: By serving as a bridge connecting regions and travelers, and addressing social issues through alleviating overtourism and regional revitalization, we advocate for a <0>new era of tourism</0> woven through people, regions, and the world.

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.description: With a focus on <0>alleviating overtourism</0> and <1>regional revitalization</1>,<2/> we create a sustainable future for tourism

customerSatisfaction.label: Customer Satisfaction
customerSatisfaction.description: Top-class retention rate in the industry

services.title: Main Services
services.subtitle: Bringing innovation to Japan's tourism industry through five specialized areas

inboundTour.title: Inbound Tour Planning & Development
inboundTour.subtitle: Planning and developing tours that channel tourism from urban to rural areas
inboundTour.description: High-end custom inbound tours for affluent travelers. We deliver exceptional experiences while simultaneously revitalizing regional economies.

consulting.title: Local Government Consulting
consulting.subtitle: Supporting the creation and expansion of tourism demand starting from inbound tourism
consulting.description: We provide comprehensive consulting, from conducting tourism resource inventories to developing promotion strategies and building tourism readiness.

dxSolution.title: DX Solutions for Tourism Businesses
dxSolution.subtitle: Business transformation using cutting-edge digital tools and AI technology
dxSolution.description: We enhance operational efficiency, optimize customer experience, and improve profitability. We provide support throughout the entire execution phase.

customTravel.title: Custom Travel Arrangements
customTravel.subtitle: For inbound foreign visitors and Japanese travelers
customTravel.description: We accommodate a wide range of purposes including tourism, inspections, and cultural experiences. From individual trips to group and corporate private tours, we plan and develop unique itineraries that leverage regional resources.

vacationRental.title: Vacation Rental Operations Leveraging Vacant Properties
vacationRental.subtitle: Effectively utilizing scattered vacant properties in rural areas
vacationRental.description: A management business that creates new value as vacation rentals. We address both the vacancy issue and tourism promotion simultaneously.

strengths.title: Our Strengths
strengths.subtitle: Reliable value created by diverse expertise and achievements

global.title: Global Perspective
global.description: Leveraging rich experience at foreign-affiliated IT companies to provide world-class services

technology.title: Cutting-edge Technology
technology.description: Operational efficiency and digital marketing strategies utilizing AI and DX

support.title: Practical Support
support.description: Hands-on consulting that accompanies from strategy formulation to execution

executives.title: Executive Team
executives.subtitle: Experts with diverse backgrounds gathered together

shoKishiro.background: After working at a travel agency, he worked for many years at foreign IT companies including Booking.com and Meta. He specializes in strategic planning for new inbound businesses and consulting for local governments, with numerous individual consulting achievements.

yoshihiroFujimoto.background: Joined after experience at major manufacturers, major consulting firms, and Microsoft. Capable of proposing operational efficiency improvements using IT technology, such as sales of customer management tools and proposals for IT solutions.

takashiAoki.background: Resides in Cebu, Philippines. With diverse experience including international cooperation in NGOs, management of BPO operations, restaurant management, and social entrepreneurship, he can solve problems without being bound by existing concepts.

junkoOkabe.background: Worked at JTB for over 30 years, with deep experience in tour development for Southeast Asia and Australia, including the Philippines.

ayanoFujimoto.background: Moved to NY, USA alone at 18. After obtaining a degree and working at a travel agency, she returned to Japan. After working at Booking.com and Google, she moved to Microsoft in 2024. Specializes in the travel industry and digital marketing, with numerous achievements with clients in various industries.

beautifulVillages.description: Discovery Hidden Japan has been certified as a member company of 'The Most Beautiful Villages in Japan' Association. We will promote sustainable tourism while preserving regional beauty and culture.
